summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Interview Preparation Assistant feature. Frontend UI and navigation working perfectly. Backend APIs experiencing timeout issues likely due to AI processing delays or connectivity problems.

critical_bugs.issue: Request timeout after 60 seconds during AI processing

connectivity_issues.issue: General timeout issues with Interview Prep endpoints
connectivity_issues.workaround: Increase timeout values or optimize AI processing

passed_tests: Interview Prep UI components (selectors, buttons, cards)
Form validation (disabled state when no data selected)
Basic CRUD operations (auth, applications, resumes, job match)
Resume analysis and job matching features
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Interview Prep API timeout issues: 1) Increase backend timeout for AI processing, 2) Add loading states and progress indicators, 3) Consider implementing async processing with status polling, 4) Verify LLM API key and service connectivity

success_percentage.backend: 70% (19/27 tests passed - Interview Prep APIs timing out)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and navigation working perfectly)
